overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious futuristic penthouse apartment at night, featuring neon-lit interiors with red and cyan accents, modern designer furniture, and panoramic city views through floor-to-ceiling glass walls. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity cinematic rendering and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance walkway with vehicle parking

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the entrance corridor past a parked futuristic vehicle and wall-mounted bamboo planters

entered.detail: sleek black sports car with green neon accents parked along the left wall
rectangular wall-mounted planter with tall bamboo plants
long vertical white neon light fixture hanging from the ceiling
transparent glass safety railing with metal frame along the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, covered entrance corridor. A futuristic luxury car is parked on the left, while bamboo planters decorate the right wall. The space is illuminated by overhead neon lights, with a glass railing visible along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-plan living room with designer furniture and neon accents

events.description: exits narrow corridor into spacious living area with panoramic glass walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the living area, observing the modern furniture and city views through the glass walls

entered.detail: large white sectional sofa with organic curved design and tufted upholstery
red LED strip lighting outlining the base of furniture and architectural edges
floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing night cityscape with distant lights
tall architectural feature with cascading water effect and vertical lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious, open-plan living room with dramatic red neon floor lighting outlining the furniture. A large white curved sofa dominates the center, while floor-to-ceiling glass walls on the right reveal a sprawling night cityscape. A decorative waterfall feature is visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: viewing area by glass wall transitioning to staircase approach

events.description: approaches glass wall to look out at the night cityscape
turns away from window and moves toward the staircase area

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass wall to view the city, then turning toward the interior staircase

entered.detail: long horizontal window with bright cyan neon lighting revealing dense greenery outside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the glass wall to observe the dark cityscape outside, then turns toward the interior. A distinctive cyan-illuminated horizontal window showing plants becomes visible on the right as the camera approaches the staircase area.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern staircase with neon accent lighting

events.description: enters staircase area with illuminated steps and vertical garden features
begins ascending the stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: walking up the modern staircase with red neon step lighting, passing the cyan illuminated garden window

entered.detail: wide stairs with dark steps and red neon lighting on the risers and edges
tall rectangular window showing dense bamboo plants with artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a modern staircase area featuring red neon lighting on the steps. A vertical garden window with bamboo is visible on the left, while the cyan-illuminated horizontal window remains visible to the right. The camera ascends the stairs toward an upper landing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, enclosed entrance into the expansive, neon-lit heights of a futuristic penthouse. It begins by gliding through a covered corridor past a luxury car and bamboo planters under the glow of overhead neon lights. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a vast living room where dramatic red floor lighting outlines a curved white sofa and a decorative waterfall, while floor-to-ceiling glass walls reveal a sprawling night cityscape. The view then shifts from the dark city skyline back toward the interior, passing a cyan-illuminated window of plants before approaching the staircase. Finally, the camera ascends a set of red-lit steps, flanked by a vertical bamboo garden and the cyan glow of the horizontal window, as it climbs toward the upper landing.
